4. Check if the first data row after the header might be skipped due to encoding issues
5. List any variables that use non-basic types (anything other than BOOL, WORD, DWORD, INT, UINT, DINT, UDINT, REAL, TIME, STRING)

content.text: I'll start by reading all the CSV files and checking their encoding.

input.command: for f in 02_HMI_vars.csv 03_INPUT_vars.csv 04_OUTPUT_vars.csv 05_ALARM_vars.csv 06_SERVO_vars.csv 10_м†ЬнТИнИђмЮЕл∞∞мґЬ_vars.csv 11_нФМлЯ∞м†А_vars.csv 12_мК§нФДлІБ0.15_vars.csv 13_мК§нФДлІБ0.23_vars.csv 14_лМРнНЉ_vars.csv 15_кµђл¶ђмК§лПДнПђ_vars.csv 16_мљФмЦі_vars.csv 17_нФДл†ИмЮД_vars.csv 18_мЮСлПЩл†•к≤АмВђ_vars.csv 19_нЖµм†Дк≤АмВђ_vars.csv 20_лґИлЯЙл∞∞мґЬ_vars.csv; do echo "=== $f ==="; file --mime-encoding "$f" 2>/dev/null; xxd "$f" | head -2; echo ""; done

python3 -c "
import os, csv

BASIC_TYPES = {'BOOL','WORD','DWORD','INT','UINT','DINT','UDINT','REAL','TIME','STRING','LREAL','LINT','ULINT','LWORD','SINT','USINT','BYTE'}
FB_TYPES = {'TON','TOF','TP','R_TRIG','F_TRIG','PUT_WORD','GET_WORD','CTU','CTD','CTUD','RS','SR','BLINK','PUT_DWORD','GET_DWORD'}

files = [
    '02_HMI_vars.csv','03_INPUT_vars.csv','04_OUTPUT_vars.csv','05_ALARM_vars.csv',
    '06_SERVO_vars.csv','10_м†ЬнТИнИђмЮЕл∞∞мґЬ_vars.csv','11_нФМлЯ∞м†А_vars.csv',
    '12_мК§нФДлІБ0.15_vars.csv','13_мК§нФДлІБ0.23_vars.csv','14_лМРнНЉ_vars.csv',
    '15_кµђл¶ђмК§лПДнПђ_vars.csv','16_мљФмЦі_vars.csv','17_нФДл†ИмЮД_vars.csv',
    '18_мЮСлПЩл†•к≤АмВђ_vars.csv','19_нЖµм†Дк≤АмВђ_vars.csv','20_лґИлЯЙл∞∞мґЬ_vars.csv'
]

for fname in files:
    # Detect encoding
    raw = open(fname,'rb').read()
    has_bom = raw[:3] == b'\xef\xbb\xbf'
    
    # Try utf-8 first, then cp949
    enc = None
    for e in ['utf-8','cp949','euc-kr']:
        try:
            raw.decode(e if not has_bom else 'utf-8-sig')
            enc = e
            if has_bom: enc = 'utf-8 (BOM)'
            break
        except: pass
    
    # Parse with detected encoding
    dec_enc = 'utf-8-sig' if has_bom else (enc if enc else 'utf-8')
    try:
        text = raw.decode(dec_enc)
    except:
        text = raw.decode('cp949')
        enc = 'cp949'
    
    lines = text.strip().split('\n')
    header = lines[0] if lines else ''
    
    var_count = len(lines) - 1  # minus header
    
    # Find type column
    cols = header.split(',')
    type_idx = None
    name_idx = None
    for i,c in enumerate(cols):
        cl = c.strip().lower()
        if cl in ['нГАмЮЕ','нГАмЮО','нШХмЛЭ','л≥АмИШнГАмЮЕ','type']: type_idx = i
        if cl in ['л≥АмИШмЭіл¶Д','л≥АмИШл™Е','мЭіл¶Д','name','л≥АмИШ мЭіл¶Д']: name_idx = i
    
    # Also check column by content pattern
    if type_idx is None:
        # Try second column or find one with BOOL/WORD etc
        for i,c in enumerate(cols):
            if 'type' in c.strip().lower() or 'нГАмЮЕ' in c.strip() or 'нГАмЮО' in c.strip():
                type_idx = i
                break
    
    fb_found = []
    nonbasic = []
    
    for line in lines[1:]:
        parts = line.split(',')
        if type_idx is not None and type_idx < len(parts):
            t = parts[type_idx].strip()
            if t.upper() in FB_TYPES:
                vname = parts[name_idx].strip() if name_idx is not None and name_idx < len(parts) else '?'
                fb_found.append((vname, t))
            elif t and t.upper() not in BASIC_TYPES and t.upper() not in ('','нГАмЮЕ'):
                vname = parts[name_idx].strip() if name_idx is not None and name_idx < len(parts) else '?'
                nonbasic.append((vname, t))
    
    needs_conv = enc != 'cp949'
    
    print(f'=== {fname} ===')
    print(f'  л≥АмИШ мИШ: {var_count}')
    print(f'  мЭЄмљФлФ©: {enc}{\" (BOM мЮИмЭМ)\" if has_bom else \"\"}')
    print(f'  нЧ§лНФ: {cols[:5]}...')
    if type_idx is not None:
        print(f'  нГАмЮЕ мїђлЯЉ: [{type_idx}] = {cols[type_idx].strip()}')
    else:
        print(f'  нГАмЮЕ мїђлЯЉ: к∞РмІА мХИлР® (мїђлЯЉ: {cols})')
    if fb_found:
        print(f'  FB нГАмЮЕ л∞Ьк≤ђ: {fb_found}')
    else:
        print(f'  FB нГАмЮЕ: мЧЖмЭМ')
    if nonbasic:
        print(f'  лєДкЄ∞л≥Є нГАмЮЕ: {nonbasic}')
    else:
        print(f'  лєДкЄ∞л≥Є нГАмЮЕ: мЧЖмЭМ')
    print(f'  cp949 л≥АнЩШ нХДмЪФ: {\"мШИ\" if needs_conv else \"мХДлЛИмШ§\"}')
    print()
"

python3 -c "
import os

files_to_convert = [
    '02_HMI_vars.csv','04_OUTPUT_vars.csv','05_ALARM_vars.csv',
    '06_SERVO_vars.csv','10_м†ЬнТИнИђмЮЕл∞∞мґЬ_vars.csv','11_нФМлЯ∞м†А_vars.csv',
    '12_мК§нФДлІБ0.15_vars.csv','13_мК§нФДлІБ0.23_vars.csv','14_лМРнНЉ_vars.csv',

    '18_мЮСлПЩл†•к≤АмВђ_vars.csv','19_нЖµм†Дк≤АмВђ_vars.csv','20_лґИлЯЙл∞∞мґЬ_vars.csv'
]

for fname in files_to_convert:
    raw = open(fname, 'rb').read()
    has_bom = raw[:3] == b'\xef\xbb\xbf'
    text = raw.decode('utf-8-sig' if has_bom else 'utf-8')
    
    # Normalize line endings to CRLF
    text = text.replace('\r\n', '\n').replace('\r', '\n').replace('\n', '\r\n')
    
    # Ensure ends with CRLF
    if not text.endswith('\r\n'):
        text += '\r\n'
    
    # Encode to cp949 (no BOM)
    cp949_bytes = text.encode('cp949')
    
    open(fname, 'wb').write(cp949_bytes)
    print(f'л≥АнЩШ мЩДл£М: {fname} (BOM: {has_bom}) -> cp949, {len(cp949_bytes)} bytes')

print()
print('=== л≥АнЩШ нЫД мЭЄмљФлФ© нЩХмЭЄ ===')
all_files = files_to_convert + ['03_INPUT_vars.csv']
for fname in sorted(all_files):
    raw = open(fname, 'rb').read()
    has_bom = raw[:3] == b'\xef\xbb\xbf'
    # Verify cp949 decode
    try:
        text = raw.decode('cp949')
        lines = text.strip().split('\r\n')
        if not lines[-1]: lines = lines[:-1]
        print(f'  {fname}: cp949 OK, {len(lines)-1}л≥АмИШ, BOM:{has_bom}')
    except:
        print(f'  {fname}: cp949 лФФмљФлФ© мЛ§нМ®!')
"
